message:
feat: bd done <id> <message> treats last arg as reason

When invoked as "bd done" (not "bd close"), the last positional
argument is used as the close reason if no --reason/-m flag was
provided. This matches the desire path: bd done <id> "Fixed it"

The "done" alias for "close" already existed; this adds the
positional message ergonomic on top of it.

Closes: hq-pe8ce

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
